title: Welcome to e-DiVA (Logged Out)
content:
Are you currently providing care for someone with dementia? Caring for someone with dementia can be both rewarding and challenging. e-DiVA is here to support you with a smart, easy-to-use Virtual Assistant designed to help you manage the responsibilities of caregiving.

 e-DiVA seeks to improve caregiver well-being by offering access to educational content and caring information. It aims to educate, provide skills, and offer support to carers.

 Whether you are looking for practical advice, emotional support, or tools to manage daily care, e-DiVA offers:

 - On-demand guidance through voice or text search
 - Culturally tailored resources in multiple languages
 - Video tutorials to help with everyday caregiving tasks
 - Tips and strategies to reduce stress and improve well-being

title: Welcome to e-DiVA (Logged In)
content:
e-DiVA is a platform that provides resources to support people who care for a loved one living with dementia (also known as carers or care partners).

 Here you can access the iSupport course, watch educational videos, stay up to date with dementia-related news, and find local support services.

 You will also find instructional videos throughout the app to help you navigate its features. You can refer to the e-DiVA user guide at any time for additional support.

title: Search Resources
content: The search bar on the home page allows users to search for educational resources, caregiving information, and dementia-related content by entering keywords.

title: Access the e-DiVA Chatbot
content: The e-DiVA chatbot button on the home page provides quick access to the virtual assistant. Users can tap the blue chatbot button to ask questions and receive caregiving guidance.

title: Become a Member
content: The 'Join Now' button allows users to create an account or log in to access personalised features within the e-DiVA application.

title: Access the iSupport Course
content: The Quick Access section includes a shortcut to the iSupport course. Users can tap 'iSupport Course' to access structured learning materials that improve dementia caregiving knowledge and skills.

title: Access Educational Videos
content: The Quick Access section includes 'Educational Videos'. Users can tap this option to watch instructional and informative dementia caregiving videos.

title: Navigate Using Footer Menu
content: The footer navigation bar allows users to move between main sections of the application, including Home, About Us, Manual, Profile, and Chatbot. Users can tap any footer icon to quickly navigate to the corresponding page.

title: Find Local Support Services
content: The Quick Access section includes 'Local Support Services', allowing users to locate dementia care and support services available in their area.

title: Access About Us
content: The Quick Access section includes an 'About Us' shortcut. Users can tap this option to view information about the purpose, project background, and research team behind e-DiVA.

title: Access User Guide
content: The Quick Access section includes a 'User Guide' shortcut. Users can tap this option to view instructions on how to navigate and use the e-DiVA application.
